# 获取视频号可下载链接

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 获取视频号可下载链接
      deprecated: false
      description: |+
        | 字段 |说明  |
        | --- | --- |
        code = 0  |调用成功
        20001    |金额不足
        101      |object_id 错误请检查
        102      |last_buffer 错误请检查
        103     | 获取下载链接失败
        105      |请求类型不存在
        401      |视频已被作者删除,或该账号因注销被系统删除。
        402      |视频已设置仅自己可见，无法获取。
        403      |未知错误
        50000    |服务器内部错误


        | 字段 |说明  |
        | --- | --- |
        object_id       |该视频的唯一id
        object_nonce_id  |object_nonce_id
        fav_count       |点赞数 （大拇指图标）
        like_count      |喜欢数 （小心心图标，官方媒体是火的图标）
        forward_count   |转发数
        comment_count   |评论数
        title           |标题
        publish_time    |发布时间
        media_type|2 图片（如果是图片类型 请使用image_list）  4 视频  9 直播
        download_url    |下载链接 （可下载  有效期1天）
        play_url    |播放链接（有效期1天）
        nickname        |视频号名字
        v2_name         |视频号唯一id
        file_size       |视频大小 字节
        video_play_len  |视频长度 秒
        thumb_url       |缩略图
        cover_url       |封面
        cost            |花费
        remain_money    |余额

      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters:
        - name: object_id
          in: query
          description: 视频唯一id 例如 ：14462543356698040491
          required: true
          example: '14462543356698040491'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: object_nonce_id
          in: query
          description: 该参数不填也可以，建议填上
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: key
          in: query
          description: 极致了key （0.2/次）
          required: true
          example: '{{key}}'
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: verifycode
          in: query
          description: 如果设置了需要填写
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: type
          in: query
          description: type=3
          required: true
          example: '3'
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                  object_id:
                    type: string
                  object_nonce_id:
                    type: string
                  fav_count:
                    type: integer
                  like_count:
                    type: integer
                  forward_count:
                    type: integer
                  comment_count:
                    type: integer
                  download_url:
                    type: string
                    description: 下载链接
                  publish_time:
                    type: string
                  title:
                    type: string
                  nickname:
                    type: string
                  v2_name:
                    type: string
                  thumb_url:
                    type: string
                  file_size:
                    type: integer
                  video_play_len:
                    type: integer
                  cover_url:
                    type: string
                  contact:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      username:
                        type: string
                      nickname:
                        type: string
                      head_url:
                        type: string
                      signature:
                        type: string
                      follow_flag:
                        type: integer
                      auth_info:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          auth_icon_type:
                            type: integer
                          auth_profession:
                            type: string
                          detail_link:
                            type: string
                          app_name:
                            type: string
                          auth_icon_url:
                            type: string
                          customer_type:
                            type: integer
                        required:
                          - auth_icon_type
                          - auth_profession
                          - detail_link
                          - app_name
                          - auth_icon_url
                          - customer_type
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - auth_icon_type
                          - auth_profession
                          - detail_link
                          - app_name
                          - auth_icon_url
                          - customer_type
                      cover_img_url:
                        type: string
                      spam_status:
                        type: integer
                      ext_flag:
                        type: integer
                      ext_info:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          country:
                            type: string
                          province:
                            type: string
                          city:
                            type: string
                        required:
                          - country
                          - province
                          - city
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - country
                          - province
                          - city
                      live_status:
                        type: integer
                      live_cover_img_url:
                        type: string
                      live_info:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          anchor_status_flag:
                            type: string
                          switch_flag:
                            type: integer
                          source_type:
                            type: integer
                          mic_setting:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              setting_flag:
                                type: integer
                              setting_switch_flag:
                                type: integer
                            required:
                              - setting_flag
                              - setting_switch_flag
                            x-apifox-orders:
                              - setting_flag
                              - setting_switch_flag
                          lottery_setting:
                            type: object
                            properties: {}
                            x-apifox-orders: []
                          live_cover_imgs:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: string
                        required:
                          - anchor_status_flag
                          - switch_flag
                          - source_type
                          - mic_setting
                          - lottery_setting
                          - live_cover_imgs
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - anchor_status_flag
                          - switch_flag
                          - source_type
                          - mic_setting
                          - lottery_setting
                          - live_cover_imgs
                      feed_count:
                        type: integer
                      bind_info:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                      menu:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                      status:
                        type: string
                      additional_flag:
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - username
                      - nickname
                      - head_url
                      - signature
                      - follow_flag
                      - auth_info
                      - cover_img_url
                      - spam_status
                      - ext_flag
                      - ext_info
                      - live_status
                      - live_cover_img_url
                      - live_info
                      - feed_count
                      - bind_info
                      - menu
                      - status
                      - additional_flag
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - username
                      - nickname
                      - head_url
                      - signature
                      - follow_flag
                      - auth_info
                      - cover_img_url
                      - spam_status
                      - ext_flag
                      - ext_info
                      - live_status
                      - live_cover_img_url
                      - live_info
                      - feed_count
                      - bind_info
                      - menu
                      - status
                      - additional_flag
                  cost:
                    type: number
                  remain_money:
                    type: number
                  play_url:
                    type: string
                    description: 播放链接
                  image_list:
                    type: string
                    description: 图片类型的 获取所有的图片视频
                  media_type:
                    type: integer
                    description: 2 图片（如果是图片类型 请使用image_list）  4 视频  9 直播
                required:
                  - code
                  - object_id
                  - object_nonce_id
                  - fav_count
                  - like_count
                  - forward_count
                  - comment_count
                  - download_url
                  - publish_time
                  - title
                  - nickname
                  - v2_name
                  - thumb_url
                  - file_size
                  - video_play_len
                  - cover_url
                  - contact
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
                  - play_url
                  - image_list
                  - media_type
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - object_id
                  - object_nonce_id
                  - fav_count
                  - like_count
                  - forward_count
                  - comment_count
                  - download_url
                  - play_url
                  - media_type
                  - image_list
                  - publish_time
                  - title
                  - nickname
                  - v2_name
                  - thumb_url
                  - file_size
                  - video_play_len
                  - cover_url
                  - contact
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
              examples:
                '1':
                  summary: 成功示例
                  value:
                    code: 0
                    object_id: '14462543356698040491'
                    object_nonce_id: '13443939311726483977_0_207_0_0'

                      https://finder.video.qq.com/251/20302/stodownload?encfilekey=Cvvj5Ix3eez3Y79SxtvVL0L7CkPM6dFibusn4vVFEyiaqFMic4DcthVW6iaoPYG8IvicibxMNqgtFHXHRZlv5EIZQGXIxouohxvFE31R44Ghg7holMdxc6XF4tfNTExStCU9k2uibGDiaZibVibkQQ16xRWiaWRQA&token=o3K9JoTic9Ig1NAWpHHKdZShcQq0xpiapiaFjiayW6AOAUjOC1ECRGj0CaBvK2XPz48v6ewiaVEfm7p882ztfcgFCNVsnibLMlg19ADSFC8VTdRpZSiam20JsdpHg&idx=1&dotrans=0&hy=SZ&m=35e69e0d6caa5507417e2991a17d833c&uzid=2
```
